_comment: OFFERS FILE — Add, edit, or remove offers here. Set enabled:false to hide an offer without deleting it. Set announcementBar.enabled:false to hide the top bar.
heading: Special Offers
subheading: Exclusive deals on our most loved services — crafted for our valued clients.

announcementBar._note: Thin banner at the very top of the page. Set enabled:false to hide it.
announcementBar.text: ✨ New clients enjoy 20% off their first visit — walk in or call to book

offers.title: First Visit Offer
offers.subtitle: 20% off your first service
offers.description: Visiting Orchid for the first time? We'd love to welcome you with 20% off any single service — haircut, facial, spa, colour, or bridal. No exclusions, no minimum spend.
offers.validity: For first-time clients only. One per person.

offers.title: Bridal Bliss Package
offers.subtitle: Complimentary pre-bridal trial
offers.description: Book our complete bridal package and receive a complimentary pre-bridal trial session. Covers skincare, hair ritual, makeup, and full-day styling — crafted to make your special day unforgettable.
offers.validity: Advance booking required (30+ days before the date). Subject to availability.

offers.title: Spa Monday
offers.subtitle: Your weekly wellness ritual
offers.description: Every Monday is Spa Day at Orchid. Enjoy special pricing on Full Body Massage, De-Stress Ritual, and Body Wraps — the perfect way to reset and recharge for the week ahead.
offers.validity: Every Monday during regular business hours. Booking recommended.
